[[File:N377 Tool Kit.png]]

Bought in the [[Minion_Sim#Sim_Shop|Minion Sim Shop]] for 600 {{RewardIconWithLink|Sim Token}}.


{{Retext|Use to upgrade Wood Golem:|blue}}

{{Retext|While preparing for battle, chance to take damage on behalf of other minions of the same rank.|blue}}

{{Retext|Available after unlocking the Minion Wood Golems.|red}}
